title: Assistant Store Manager - FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd!
